title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Tour Event Details
text: Campus tour 18 November. Event Status: Completed. Date & Time: November 18, 2025, 3:00 PM IST. Location: International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India. Book now. Join us for an exciting in-person event at University of Southampton Delhi where you can explore our state-of-the-art facilities and get a feel for campus life. This is your chance to experience first-hand what it’s like to be a part of our vibrant community. Don’t miss out on this opportunity to discover all that the University of Southampton has to offer. International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101, India. Open address in Google Maps.
summary: This entry details a completed campus tour event held on November 18, 2025, at the University of Southampton Delhi, located in Gurugram, India.
